languages.text: "Себериан, ты пойдешь со мной, чтобы вернуть династии украденное?"
"Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"
languages.original_text: "Себериан, ты пойдешь со мной, чтобы вернуть династии украденное?"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"
"Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"
"Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

languages.text: 「シベリア、王朝が盗まれた財産を取り戻すために、私と一緒に来てくれるか？」
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: 「シベリア、王朝が盗まれた財産を取り戻すために、私と一緒に来てくれるか？」

languages.text: «Seberian, ¿me acompañará a recuperar las posesiones robadas de la dinastía?».
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: «Seberian, ¿me acompañará a recuperar las posesiones robadas de la dinastía?».

languages.text: “塞贝里安，你可愿随我一同夺回王朝的失窃宝物？”
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: “塞贝里安，你可愿随我一同夺回王朝的失窃宝物？”

languages.text: "Seberian, werdet Ihr mich begleiten, um die gestohlenen Besitztümer der Dynastie zurückzuholen?"
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, werdet Ihr mich begleiten, um die gestohlenen Besitztümer der Dynastie zurückzuholen?"

languages.text: "Seberian, hanedanlığın çalınan varlıklarını geri getirmek için benimle gelecek misin?"
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: "Seberian, hanedanlığın çalınan varlıklarını geri getirmek için benimle gelecek misin?"

languages.text: « Seberian, m'aiderez-vous à reprendre les biens volés de la dynastie ? »
languages.original_text: "Seberian, will you come with me to bring back the dynasty's stolen possessions?"

traits.locale_text: « Seberian, m'aiderez-vous à reprendre les biens volés de la dynastie ? »
